TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Myron_Brown, title = Myron_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Myron_Brown} }

S.FORM: Myron Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 11, Myron Brown, squliq na p'unro. maki sa kawas 2006 lga mhngaw ini ptzyuwaw la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Myron Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 11, Myron Brown, squliq na p'unro. maki sa kawas 2006 lga mhngaw ini ptzyuwaw la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mjron βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, mjron βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa mħŋaw ini ptzjuwaw la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
